vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely unsupported by the visual evidence. P1, P2, and P4 are not identifiable as living specimens. P3 (Pothos) is present but in a state of severe decline.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos anchor (white rabbit) visible, but the plant itself is severely desiccated or absent.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible in black pot.

plant_audit.P3: The white rabbit anchor remains, but the foliage previously associated with this pot has vanished or withered into the substrate.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Consistently dark, dry, and devoid of organic life.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments are present in the foreground pot, acting as a persistent anomaly.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no signs of recent spillage or biological spread.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t-4: Initial state shows a single green sprout/stem in the foreground pot.
temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-2: The sprout exhibits signs of chlorosis and postural collapse, eventually disappearing.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_current: Total loss of visible vegetation across all pots. The biome has entered a state of complete dormancy or death.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is non-viable. The lack of chlorophyll-rich tissue and the presence of only inert soil and debris indicate a total systemic failure of the indoor garden.
anomalies: Persistent eggshell fragments in the foreground pot.
Total absence of the registered P1, P2, and P4 specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic loss of the botanical collection. Over the 5-day observation period, the singular green specimen observed in the earliest image underwent rapid senescence and disappeared. Currently, the pots contain only soil and decorative debris. The environment is effectively sterile regarding the expected plant life.
